claim_boundary: Focused code change and local Rust compilation only. Does not prove the deployed WIN-TEMPLATE agent emitted a new ML alert.

changes.summary: Malicious ML scan results now emit top-level DetectionType::Ml and metadata source ml_analysis.
Alert detection metadata now includes source and detection_source derived from normalized detection type.
Evidence tests now assert ML maps to source ml and detection_source ml.

server_elixir_tests.reason: mix and elixir are not available in this shell PATH.

next_required_work: Deploy updated server/agent bridge to the environment used by WIN-TEMPLATE.
Run a controlled malicious fixture through WIN-TEMPLATE with ONNX/local ML enabled.
Assert a new alert has detection_metadata.source equal to ml and appears in /app/alerts.
Verify live socket broadcast on alerts:feed for the new ML alert.
